title: Partnerize Partners API Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions extracted from the Partnerize Partners API (OAS 3.0.1)

is_foreign_network.description: Reporting only flag. All conversions will be automatically approved but will not be invoiceable.

network_id.description: ID of the network this publisher belongs to

phone_area.description: Phone prefix to declare country or region

1011l22.description: Dynamic property name equal to the Payment details set Id. Example - 1011l22

total_conversion_count.description: conversion count for each currency. E.g. "USD": 25, "EUR": 37

currency_iso.description: key value pairs where the currency iso is the key. E.g. EUR: 37

total_commission_value.description: commission value for each currency. E.g. "USD": 324.65, "EUR": 583.59

currency_iso.description: key value pairs where the currency iso is the key. E.g. EUR: 37

total_order_value.description: order value for each currency. E.g. "USD": 4000, "EUR": 5400.25

currency_iso.description: key value pairs where the currency iso is the key. E.g. EUR: 37

total_publisher_commission_value.description: commission value for each currency. E.g. "USD": 400, "EUR": 311.215

currency_iso.description: key value pairs where the currency iso is the key. E.g. EUR: 37
key value pairs where the `currency iso` is the key and the value is an object containing a set of stats for the currency
key value pairs where the `currency iso` is the key and the value is an object containing a set of stats for the currency

range{index}.description: an indexed range. E.g. range0, range1, etc.

total_conversion_count.description: conversion count for each currency. E.g. "USD": 25, "EUR": 37

currency_iso.description: key value pairs where the currency iso is the key. E.g. EUR: 37

total_publisher_commission.description: total commission for each currency. E.g. "USD": 250.5, "EUR": 180.9

currency_iso.description: key value pairs where the currency iso is the key. E.g. EUR: 37
key value pairs where the currency iso is the key. E.g. EUR: 37

meta_data.description: Key value pairs of meta data
Key value pairs of meta data
Key value pairs of meta data
Key value pairs of meta data

advertiser_id.description: ID of the brand the campaign should belong to

report_meta_purge_period.description: The number of days that Meta Reports will be stored before being purged

commission_groups.description: Commission groups associated with the voucher

publishers.description: IDs of the publishers to be associated with the group

publisher_id.description: ID of the partner the website belongs to
ID of the partner the database belongs to

available.description: Amount of money available to the partner to withdraw
available.title: The propery name* is the currency code and the value is amount of money, e.g. 'GBP':'12.45'

confirmed.description: Amount that will be available once issued brand's invoices are paid
confirmed.title: The propery name* is the currency code and the value is amount of money, e.g. 'GBP':'12.45'

pending.title: The propery name* is the currency code and the value is amount of money, e.g. 'GBP':'12.45'

approved.title: The propery name* is the currency code and the value is amount of money, e.g. 'GBP':'12.45'

paid.title: The propery name* is the currency code and the value is amount of money, e.g. 'GBP':'12.45'

iso.description: The ISO code for the country

printable_name.description: The dictionary word for the locale

iso.description: The ISO value for the currency

conversion_type.description: The name of the extra field

conversion_type_id.description: The id of the conversion type
